CustomField.description: The first and last name of the evaluator.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Evaluator_User__c)), Evaluator_User__r.FirstName & ", " & Evaluator_User__r.LastName, Evaluator_Contact__r.FirstName & ", " & Evaluator_Contact__r.LastName )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Autogenerated first and last name of the evaluator for this evaluation.
CustomField.label: Evaluator Name
